cells.rationale: Schema-version bump, new event payloads, and the UPSERT preserve-list edit are contract-touching event-sourcing work where a missed once-marker silently re-fires escalations — highest blast radius.
The epic's flagged proof point: a novel cross-store lineage-assembly data path with bounded cycle-guarded walk and degrade semantics — new pattern, spans two stores, intelligence-sensitive.
Mirrors the resolve:: launch pattern across a few files, but the dep-free leaf discipline and the deliberate keep-retry-wire-narrow contract decision need opus judgment; path is otherwise clear.

Markdown skill authoring following the close/ template, but security-sensitive: untrusted-transcript handling, least-privilege allowlists, and precise command/decline recipes warrant opus over sonnet.
Intricate daemon rewire with producer-only re-fold discipline, double-dispatch occupancy guards, a shared global-cap helper, and botctl-failure handling — concurrency-heavy, high blast radius.
Same daemon concurrency reasoning as .5 plus per-epic serialization for the herd case and an audit-then-delete of the notifyPlanner/bus-wake plumbing — risky dead-code removal needing opus.

Docs are low-blast-radius but this requires synthesizing the whole epic's semantics into an accurate CLAUDE.md (re-narration lint gate) and a coherent ADR — not mechanical; opus for accuracy of the guardrails file.
